title: tragia laciniata
intro: Tragia laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved spurge, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its distinctive cut or laciniate leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragia laciniata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally to treat wounds and skin irritations, or taken internally to support digestive health.
